arcs.title: Passable (Conditional)
arcs.summary: Day 3 resolved: Christine identified the condition by holding the chart to window light and reading the ghost line against the Hempworth November drainage margins. The condition is water — specifically, the secondary channel that runs July through August only. Steve confirmed this was exactly his working theory, which Christine accepted. The southwest terrain is passable now, in July. No departure date named. Brass ducks still southwest. Jeep at its new angle. Day 4 should deliver the resolution: a departure date is named, the route is committed to, and the southwest quadrant is visited in the only way that settles a chart — by going there.
